basic_details.job_title: GIPCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Deputy General Manager, Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy General Manager (Finance), Supervisor / Sr. Assistant - Admin, Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor (Secretarial)
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Industries Power Company (GIPCL) Recruitment Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.gipcl.com/. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced for the posts of Deputy General Manager (Finance), Supervisor / Sr. Assistant – Admin, and Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor (Secretarial) through the GIPCL Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountant / CMA, Graduation with minimum 50%, Graduate with CS Inter
qualification.details: Deputy General Manager (Finance): A Graduate with professional qualification - Chartered Accountant / CMA. Supervisor / Sr. Assistant - Admin: Preferably any Graduation with minimum 50% (from reputed university). Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor (Secretarial): Preferably Graduate with Semi Qualified Company Secretary (preferably CS Inter).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GIPCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GIPCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GIPCL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GIPCL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GIPCL Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF Download GIPCL Supervisor / Sr. Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF Download GIPCL Deputy General Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GIPCL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Deputy General Manager (Finance): A Graduate with professional qualification - Chartered Accountant / CMA. Supervisor / Sr. Assistant - Admin: Preferably any Graduation with minimum 50% (from reputed university). Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor (Secretarial): Preferably Graduate with Semi Qualified Company Secretary (preferably CS Inter).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GIPCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GIPCL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GIPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the GIPCL recruitment is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GIPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by Gujarat Industeries Power Company (GIPCL) for various posts in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for GIPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for GIPCL Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Deputy General Manager (Finance) post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Deputy General Manager (Finance) position, candidates must be a Graduate with a professional qualification such as Chartered Accountant (CA) or Cost and Management Accountant (CMA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for GIPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category of candidates applying for the GIPCL Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions at GIPCL?
faq.answer: The positions advertised under this GIPCL Recruitment 2026 are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification for the Supervisor / Sr. Assistant - Admin post?
faq.answer: For the Supervisor / Sr. Assistant - Admin role, candidates should preferably hold any Graduation degree with a minimum of 50% marks from a reputed university.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for GIPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification specifies Gujarat as the state for this recruitment. While not explicitly stated, it's advisable to check the detailed notification for any domicile restrictions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the qualification required for the Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor (Secretarial) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Sr. Supervisor / Supervisor (Secretarial) position should preferably be a Graduate and a Semi-Qualified Company Secretary, with preference given to those who have completed CS Intermediate.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for GIPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The direct link to download the official notification PDF for GIPCL Recruitment 2026 is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
